title: dolomiaea calophylla
intro: Dolomiaea calophylla, also known as the Chinese dragon flower or dragon flower, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling in the body. The plant is rich in compounds such as furanocoumarins, which are believed to have antioxidant and antiseptic properties, offering various health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. Dolomiaea calophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
